features.description: Geofenced attendance + clock-in gates. When off, evaluations still record on the audit log but consumers ignore the OUTSIDE verdict.
The /preflight endpoint used by mobile clients before submitting a real check-in.
Admins can approve overrides on rejected checks via the Approvals surface.
Branch fences drawn as polygons. When off, radius-mode only.
Simple radius fallback around branch centroid. Always available.
